client_type.description: Client classification. Nullable, no default. Null means unclassified. Drives the buyer_code prefix (Law Firm LF, Aggregator AG, Reseller RS, Network NW).

buyer_code.description: Unique buyer code: client_type prefix plus an incrementing number allocated from the Counter entity, one counter per prefix (e.g. LF1, AG1, NW2). Only allocated when client_type is set.

portal_enabled.description: When true, this buyer can log into the partner portal

billing_mode.description: Lead Count mode (post-pay invoicing) vs Wallet mode (pre-paid balance)

billing_type.description: Operator billing arrangement for this buyer

verify_required.description: Whether verification is required for this buyer

ipl_fee_pct.description: Multiplier applied to CPL to produce IPL. 0.875 means the buyer is billed 87.5 percent of CPL.

credit_limit.description: Optional credit limit for this buyer. Nullable.

billing_model.description: Billing model description e.g. Net 30, Prepaid

min_balance.description: Minimum balance threshold before auto-recharge / pause

card_last4.description: Last 4 digits of the connected card, if any

leadbyte_bid.description: LeadByte buyer id. Nullable. Defaults to the buyer_code value when a code is allocated.

payment_link_url.description: Payment link URL for this buyer. Nullable.

onboarded_at.description: When the buyer completed onboarding. Nullable.

suppression_lists.description: JSON array of suppression list names / references

coverage.description: JSON object describing coverage by state / zip / county

campaign_ids.description: JSON array of Campaign record ids assigned to this buyer

auto_created.description: True when auto-created from a LeadByte sold response

status.description: Buyer lifecycle status. Kept in sync with the active boolean at the data layer: status active derives active true, while draft, launching, paused, or terminated derive active false. The live pipeline reads the active boolean.

active.description: Derived from status: true only when status equals active, false for draft, launching, paused, or terminated. The live pipeline reads this boolean. Must be recomputed on every write.
